basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for TGT, Lab Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Staff (TGT, Laboratory assistant and More Posts)
basic_details.short_information: The Sainik School Bhubaneswar has officially announced the Staff (TGT, Laboratory Assistant and More Posts) Recruitment 2026 with 8 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official Sainik School Bhubaneswar website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 50 years (post-specific limits apply) and hold the required educational and professional qualifications for TGT (English, Odia, Social Science, Mathematics), Laboratory Assistant, PTI-cum-Matron, and Nursing Sister posts can now submit their applications offline on or before 12 June 2026. Direct links to download the no

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 50 years (varies by post)
age_limit.details: TGT (ENGLISH): Minimum 21 years, Maximum 35 years TGT-ODIA: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 35 years TGT-SOCIAL SCIENCE: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 35 years TGT (MATHEMATICS): Minimum 21 years, Maximum 35 years LABORATORY ASSISTANT (PHYSICS): Minimum 21 years, Maximum 35 years PTI-CUM-MATRON (FEMALE): Minimum 18 years, Maximum 50 years NURSING SISTER (FEMALE): Minimum 18 years, Maximum 50 years

qualification.education_qualification: Various posts including TGT (English, Odia, Social Science, Mathematics), Laboratory Assistant, PTI-cum-Matron, Nursing Sister with specific educational and professional qualifications.
qualification.details: TGT (ENGLISH): Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognised institution/University with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject as well as in the aggregate including B Ed component. OR Bachelor/Honours Degree from recognized institution/university with at least 50% marks in English / combination of subjects as well as in the aggregate AND B Ed Degree from NCTE recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks OR Three year integrated B Ed - M Ed from NCTE recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks OR 01 year B Ed (Special Education) from Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI) with at least 50% marks. Post Graduation in concerned subject/ any specialization in concerned subject with a minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade provided that the candidate has studied the subject(s) mentioned in the note below at the graduation level and three year integrated B Ed - M Ed from NCTE recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks. Qualified in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET) Paper-2 conducted by CBSE / Pass in the Teacher Eligibility Test (TET) for Secondary School conducted by appropriate Government. TGT-ODIA: The candidate must have passed Class X standard in Modern Indian Language (MIL) Odia. OR The candidate not having Odia as a subject up to Class X standard must have qualified at the Single Subject Odia Examination up to High School standard conducted by Board of Secondary Education, Cuttack, Odisha. Odia as an Honours/Pass/Elective/Major/Special Subject at Graduation level (studied concerned language as a subject/Elective subject in at least 03 years /06 semesters of course) with at least 50% marks from any recognised University. B Ed with 50% marks in aggregate from recognised university / NCTE recognised institution. Qualified in the Teacher Eligibility Test (TET) Paper-2 (Paper-1 to teach up to middle class), conducted by the appropriate Government. Four years integrated degree course with Odia language of Regional College of Education of NCERT or other NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject as well as in the aggregate. TGT-SOCIAL SCIENCE: Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognised institution/University with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject as well as in the aggregate including B Ed component. OR Bachelor/Honours Degree from recognized institution/university with at least 50% marks in concerned subject / combination of subjects as well as in the aggregate AND B Ed Degree from NCTE recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks OR Three year integrated B Ed - M Ed from NCTE recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks OR 01 year B Ed (Special Education) from Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI) with at least 50% marks. Post Graduation in concerned subject/ any specialization in concerned subject with a minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade provided that the candidate has studied the subject(s) mentioned in the note below at the graduation level and three year integrated B Ed - M Ed from NCTE recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks. Qualified in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET) Paper-2 conducted by CBSE / Pass in the Teacher Eligibility Test (TET) for Secondary School conducted by appropriate Government. TGT (MATHEMATICS): Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognised institution/University with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject as well as in the aggregate including B Ed component. OR Bachelor/Honours Degree from recognized institution/university with at least 50% marks in concerned subject / combination of subjects as well as in the aggregate AND B Ed Degree from NCTE recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks OR Three year integrated B Ed - M Ed from NCTE recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks OR 01 year B Ed (Special Education) from Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI) with at least 50% marks. Post Graduation in concerned subject/ any specialization in concerned subject with a minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade provided that the candidate has studied the subject(s) mentioned in the note below at the graduation level and three year integrated B Ed - M Ed from NCTE recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks. Qualified in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET) Paper-2 conducted by CBSE / Pass in the Teacher Eligibility Test (TET) for Secondary School conducted by appropriate Government. LABORATORY ASSISTANT (PHYSICS): Intermediate Science or equivalent in the subject (Physics). PTI-CUM-MATRON (FEMALE): Bachelor Degree in Physical Education from a recognized University / Institution OR Diploma in Physical Education from a recognized University/Institution provided that the admission qualification for the diploma is at least University's Degree. NURSING SISTER (FEMALE): Nursing Diploma / Nursing Degree with 5 years experience or Ex-serviceman of Medical Assistant / MNS trade with at least 5 Yrs service after training.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 44,900/- in Level 7, Rs 25,500/- in Level 4, Rs 40,000/- consolidated
salary_details.details: TGT (ENGLISH): Rs 44,900/- in the Level 7 of the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC recommendations. TGT-ODIA: Rs 44,900/- in the Level 7 of the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC recommendations. TGT-SOCIAL SCIENCE: Rs 44,900/- in the Level 7 of the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC recommendations. TGT (MATHEMATICS): Rs 44,900/- in the Level 7 of the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC recommendations. LABORATORY ASSISTANT (PHYSICS): Rs 25,500/- in the Level 4 of the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC recommendations. PTI-CUM-MATRON (FEMALE): Rs 40,000/- consolidated pay per month. NURSING SISTER (FEMALE): Rs 40,000/- (Consolidated per month).

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Interview (wherever applicable)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sainikschoolbhubaneswar.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for Sainik School Bhubaneswar Staff Recruitment 2026 is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Sainik School Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Sainik School Bhubaneswar has announced a total of 8 vacancies for various Staff Recruitment posts, including TGT, Laboratory Assistant, PTI-cum-Matron, and Nursing Sister.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for Sainik School Bhubaneswar Staff Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the Principal, Sainik School Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post. For TGT posts, the minimum age is 21 years and the maximum is 35 years. For PTI-cum-Matron and Nursing Sister, the age limit is between 18 to 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for TGT posts?
faq.answer: The salary for TGT posts in Sainik School Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 is Rs 44,900/- in Level 7 of the Pay Matrix as per the 7th CPC recommendations.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Laboratory Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Laboratory Assistant (Physics) post, candidates must have passed Intermediate Science or equivalent in Physics.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for Sainik School Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs 400/-, while Women, SC, and ST candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically includes a Written Test, Skill Test, and Interview (wherever applicable). Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific details.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sainik School Bhubaneswar, which is www.sainikschoolbhubaneswar.edu.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to submit self-attested copies of educational and technical qualifications, experience certificates, caste certificates (in the prescribed format), and online fee payment details (wherever applicable).

faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for Sainik School Bhubaneswar Staff Recruitment 2026 is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.
